name: Under the Moonlight
original_name: รักใต้แสงจันทร์
overview: Phat, a young aristocrat from Bangkok, is sent north on a political mission but, after a mysterious lunar eclipse, awakens in the present day. There, he meets Namping, a free-spirited musician deeply rooted in Lanna culture. Between two worlds and under the gentle sound of the salo, Phat embarks on a journey of newfound freedom and feelings he never knew existed in his time.

trailers.title: [Official Trailer] รักใต้แสงจันทร์ Under The Moonlight
